quick-build.name: Quick Build
quick-build.description: Simple projects: scripts, CLIs, prototypes, small apps, one-off tools. One agent does everything.

roles.focus: full-stack: code, tests, docs, everything

web-app.name: Web App
web-app.description: Full-stack web apps: SaaS, dashboards, admin panels, CMS, e-commerce storefronts. Frontend + backend + data layer.

roles.focus: features, components, API routes, database queries
framework best practices, library evaluation, API docs, design patterns

api-service.name: API Service
api-service.description: Backend APIs: REST, GraphQL, microservices, serverless functions. Data-heavy, integration-heavy.

roles.focus: endpoints, middleware, database layer, integrations
API design patterns, third-party API docs, schema design, protocol specs

frontend.name: Frontend
frontend.description: Client-side apps: SPAs, PWAs, browser extensions, design systems, component libraries.

roles.focus: components, pages, styling, state management, animations
UI/UX patterns, accessibility standards, browser APIs, CSS techniques, library docs

mobile.name: Mobile App
mobile.description: Mobile apps: React Native, Flutter, Swift, Kotlin. Platform-specific quirks, navigation, native APIs.

roles.focus: screens, navigation, native modules, platform-specific code
platform APIs, native capabilities, device compatibility, app store guidelines

game.name: Game Dev
game.description: Games and interactive experiences: browser games, game engines, simulations. Game logic, rendering, audio, input handling.

roles.focus: game loop, mechanics, rendering, audio, input, level design, UI/HUD
game design patterns, engine APIs, audio synthesis, physics algorithms, reference games

ai-llm.name: AI / LLM App
ai-llm.description: AI-powered apps: RAG systems, chatbots, agents, prompt engineering, embeddings, fine-tuning pipelines.

roles.focus: chains, agents, embeddings, retrieval, prompt templates, API integration
prompt optimization, model evaluation, hallucination testing, benchmarks, paper findings

data-pipeline.name: Data & ML
data-pipeline.description: Data engineering and ML: pipelines, ETL, training, analytics, notebooks, model serving.

roles.focus: pipelines, transformations, model training, data loading, feature engineering
data exploration, model selection, experiment tracking, benchmarks, statistical methods

library.name: Library / SDK
library.description: Reusable packages: npm modules, Python packages, Rust crates. API design, backwards compatibility, documentation, cross-platform.

roles.focus: core logic, public API, type definitions, examples
similar libraries, API design conventions, ecosystem standards, backwards compatibility patterns

infra-devops.name: Infrastructure
infra-devops.description: DevOps and platform: Terraform, Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD, cloud architecture, monitoring.

roles.focus: IaC configs, pipelines, Dockerfiles, Helm charts, monitoring setup
cloud provider docs, pricing, service limits, best practices, security baselines

enterprise.name: Enterprise Platform
enterprise.description: Large-scale systems: monorepos, multi-service architectures, payment systems, trading platforms. Needs architecture oversight, strict review, thorough testing.

roles.focus: features, cross-package changes, integrations, migrations
architecture, API contracts, security, compliance, breaking changes
regulations, compliance requirements, vendor docs, integration specs, migration guides

realtime.name: Realtime / Multiplayer
realtime.description: Live systems: WebSocket apps, multiplayer games, collaborative editors, chat, streaming. State sync, conflict resolution, connection handling.

roles.focus: WebSocket handlers, state sync, conflict resolution, protocols, reconnection
CRDT algorithms, sync protocols, connection management patterns, scaling strategies

blockchain.name: Blockchain / Web3
blockchain.description: Smart contracts, dApps, DeFi protocols. Solidity, gas optimization, security audits, fork testing.

roles.focus: smart contracts, frontend integration, deployment scripts
security audit, reentrancy, gas optimization, access control
EIP standards, protocol mechanics, audit reports, gas benchmarks, similar contracts

embedded.name: Embedded / IoT
embedded.description: Hardware-adjacent: firmware, Arduino/RPi, drivers, sensors, RTOS. Timing-sensitive, resource-constrained.

roles.focus: firmware, protocols, hardware abstraction, timing-critical code
datasheets, pin configurations, protocol specs, hardware limitations, reference implementations

migration.name: Migration / Rewrite
migration.description: Framework upgrades, language migrations, legacy rewrites. High risk, needs careful review and regression testing.

roles.focus: rewrite, adaptation, codemods, compatibility shims
diff review, regression detection, API parity, backwards compatibility
migration guides, breaking changes, deprecation notices, upgrade paths, codemod tools

docs.name: Documentation
docs.description: Technical writing: docs sites, tutorials, API references, READMEs. Accuracy and clarity matter.

roles.focus: writing, formatting, examples, code snippets, publishing
fact checking, API verification, completeness audit, reference comparison, link validation

security.name: Security
security.description: Security-focused work: pen testing, vulnerability research, compliance, hardening. Needs adversarial thinking.

roles.focus: security audit, OWASP, threat modeling, input validation, auth flows
fixes, hardening, security middleware, encryption, access control
CVE databases, attack vectors, exploit techniques, compliance frameworks, security advisories
